originalTitle: One more push and RL envs will be fast and easy
title: Refactoring PufferLib's Environment API for Simpler Buffer Handling
summary: Worked on stripping the last bits of fat from PufferLib's custom environment API by making the native vectorized API the primary interface. Merged a Triple Triad environment PR and debugged buffer allocation and reset/step methods to reduce boilerplate for new environments.
